'''langasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zaleplon|zaleplon]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ng-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zaleplon|zaleplon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| langasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:længæshæth|længæshæth]] || [[word:længæshæj|længæshæj]] || [[word:længæshæsh|længæshæsh]] || [[word:længæshæ|længæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:langangashath|langangashath]] || [[word:langangashaj|langangashaj]] || [[word:langangashash|langangashash]] || [[word:langangasha|langangasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:langashath|langashath]] || [[word:langashaj|langashaj]] || [[word:langashash|langashash]] || [[word:langasha|langasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:langafshath|langafshath]] || [[word:langafshaj|langafshaj]] || [[word:langafshash|langafshash]] || [[word:langafshaf|langafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:langashatha|langashatha]] || [[word:langashaja|langashaja]] || [[word:langashasha|langashasha]] || [[word:langashaka|langashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:langashath|langashath]] || [[word:langashaj|langashaj]] || [[word:langashash|langashash]] || [[word:langasha|langasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:langashathal|langashathal]] || [[word:langashajal|langashajal]] || [[word:langashashal|langashashal]] || [[word:langashakal|langashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:langashathatha|langashathatha]] || [[word:langashajaja|langashajaja]] || [[word:langashashasha|langashashasha]] || [[word:langashaka|langashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:langashathan|langashathan]] || [[word:langashajan|langashajan]] || [[word:langashashan|langashashan]] || [[word:langashakan|langashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:langashathaoro|langashathaoro]] || [[word:langashajaoro|langashajaoro]] || [[word:langashashaoro|langashashaoro]] || [[word:langashakaoro|langashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
